name: MRG Metals Ltd
summary: MRG Metals Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, explores for and develops heavy mineral sands. It holds interest in Mozambique HMS project comprising the Corridor Central and Corridor Souuth; the Linhuane Project that consists of 113 km2; and the Marao and Marruca Project, which covers 491 km2. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Ballarat, Australia.
